differentials.name: Structural abnormalities of pharynx / esophagus (congenital / acquired tracheoesophageal + tracheopulmonary fistula), laryngectomy
differentials.raw: Structural abnormalities of pharynx / esophagus (congenital / acquired tracheoesophageal + tracheopulmonary fistula), laryngectomy

context: =  intake of solid / liquid materials into the airways and lungs Predisposing factors: Substrate: (a)  solids ›  foreign bodies ›  lentils (b)  liquids ›  gastric acid = Mendelson syndrome ›  water = near drowning ›  barium, water-soluble contrast material ›  liquid paraffin / petroleum = acute exogenous lipoid pneumonia / fire-eater pneumonia ›  mineral oil / cod liver oil = chronic exogenous lipoid pneumonia (c)  contaminated substances from oropharynx / GI tract
